title: Dispatcher mechanism: longest-prefix command resolution, group-usage fallbacks, full state.* port, bee_state.mjs shim
action: Per DB1-DB3: extend resolveCommand (bee.mjs) to longest-prefix match over registry names so 3-token commands like 'state worker add' resolve (state.worker.add); add a group-usage fallback so a bare group token prints that group's legacy 'Use:' line byte-exact and exits non-zero (the shim always supplies the group token, so the generic no-command path can never fire for helper calls). Add 'dry-run' to FLAG_ALONE_BOOLEANS (bee.mjs:629) and update that comment's closed-set framing — otherwise 'worker prune --dry-run --json' consumes --json as the value of --dry-run. Add registry entries + handlers for every bee_state verb: set, gate, worker add/update/remove/clear/prune (--dry-run rejected on every verb except worker prune — a cross-verb rule, bee_state.mjs:405-409), scribing-run, start-feature — reusing lib/state.mjs functions; every stdout/stderr byte and exit code stays exactly as the existing tests pin them (test_lib bee_state checks are the contract; use an existing registry entry as the shape template — entry.helper non-empty string per test_bee_cli.mjs:149, parameters JSON-Schema object, examples literally executable). Replace bee_state.mjs body with the thin shim: import { main } from './bee.mjs'; process.exitCode = main(['state', ...process.argv.slice(2)]). Update BOTH hardcoded group whitelists in test_bee_cli.mjs (~line 169 and ~line 253: ['status','cells','reservations','decisions']) plus the DA5 bijection derivation to include the state group. Copy templates to .bee/bin siblings. Full suite green without weakening any existing assertion.

truths: node .bee/bin/bee_state.mjs <anything> behaves byte-identically to before (all pinned test_lib state checks pass unchanged)
node .bee/bin/bee.mjs state worker add --name x works and matches the shim path output
a bare 'bee_state.mjs' invocation still prints the five-verb Use: line and exits non-zero
templates and .bee/bin stay byte-identical (existing guard green)
artifacts: bijection/parity test coverage for state group
prohibitions: never weaken or delete an existing test assertion to get green
no changes to the 4 legacy groups in this cell

trace.outcome: Unified dispatcher now owns all state.* verbs: longest-prefix command resolution (3-token state.worker.add), state group-usage fallback emitting legacy Use: lines byte-exact on stderr, dry-run added to FLAG_ALONE_BOOLEANS, 9 state registry entries + handlers reusing lib/state.mjs, and bee_state.mjs collapsed to a thin shim over main(['state',...]). Templates copied byte-identical to .bee/bin.
trace.verification_evidence: {"red_failure_evidence":"Before the fix, adding the 9 state.* registry entries and shimming bee_state.mjs failed 2 test_lib bee_state checks: 'worker prune rejects unknown flags' and 'start-feature requires --feature' both saw EMPTY stderr because (a) the generic validate() layer routed the missing-flag error to stdout as a structured error, and (b) the pre-parse rest-scan jsonRequested treated a --json token that --dryrun had consumed as a value as if JSON was requested, sending handler errors to stdout. New longest-prefix resolveCommand and the state group-usage fallback were also red against the old 2-token resolveCommand + generic nearest-match path (bare bee_state.mjs would have printed 'Did you mean status?' instead of the five-verb Use: line).","green_evidence":"test_lib.mjs: 220 passed, 0 failed | test_bee_cli.mjs: 82 passed, 0 failed | test_onboard_bee.mjs: failures 0, skipped 1 | combined chained exit=0. Bonus: test_bee_write_guard_hook.mjs still 16 passed, 0 failed. Template<->.bee/bin byte-parity guard (test_lib:4856) green. Manual: shim `bee_state.mjs worker add` and direct `bee.mjs state worker add` both print 'Added worker \"x\" (cell c1).' exit 0; bare bee_state.mjs prints the five-verb Use: line on stderr exit 1."}
trace.verify_output: test_lib: 220 passed, 0 failed | test_bee_cli: 82 passed, 0 failed | test_onboard_bee: failures 0, skipped 1 | combined exit=0
